prompt: Create a vintage illustrated travel poster for ANCIENT JAPAN, with a cream paper border and soft grainy print texture. At the very top, add centered promotional text: Explore worlds like these in Visionaria in muted red, and below it the smaller subtitle First Cinematic Imagination App in gray. The main poster art should be a serene stylized Japanese shrine landscape: a path of exactly 7 red torii gates receding into the distance with black caps and black bases, two red hanging lanterns on the nearest gate, pink cherry blossom trees on both sides, dark green pine forest behind them, and Mount Fuji centered in the background with a snowcapped peak and a pale orange sun partially behind the mountain. Include exactly 7 small pink bird silhouettes in the sky. On the right side place a small traditional red-and-dark-roof shrine building among bushes. In the foreground include a calm blue koi pond with exactly 2 white koi fish with orange-red markings, exactly 4 round green lily pads, and one dark rock at the left edge. Use a flattened mid-century travel-poster illustration style with pastel colors, clean geometric shapes, subtle shading, no photorealism, and a peaceful cinematic composition. At the bottom, centered below the image, place large widely spaced uppercase title text ANCIENT JAPAN in dark blue-gray, and beneath it the subtitle Land of the Rising Sun in smaller gray letter-spaced type.
